description: Perfect for those casual days, this mimalistic boot is a comfort level every man must incorporate in his wardrobe. UpperLeather upper for durability and styleHigh-ankle for upper foot protectionLace-up system for snug, customised Fit with D-ring eyeletsLong leather tongue with a fabric inner lining for a comfortable, abrasion-free wearLeather inner lining of the collar for a comfortable wearPadded fabric footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heelMulti-directional lugs with flex groovesshoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
